name: hoteliq
description: HotelIQ - Agentic Travel Marketing Intelligence Platform

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=packages/observability && npm run build --workspace=packages/agents && npm run build --workspace=packages/pipelines
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/api
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build && node verify-build.js
